features.name: Diagram List Page
features.description: Grid of DiagramCard components with create/delete, empty state, and loading skeleton

features.name: Editor Route
features.description: Editor page at /diagrams/[id] with server component wrapping DiagramEditor client component

features.name: Foundation
features.description: Shared types, Supabase browser/server clients, diagrams API routes (GET/POST/PATCH/DELETE) with Clerk auth

features.name: Auto-save + Save Status
features.description: 1500ms debounced auto-save with enabled guard, SaveStatusBadge with color-coded states

features.name: Custom Node Types
features.description: 7 node types: Default, Input, Output, Decision (diamond), Process (double-border), Note (folded corner), Group (resizable) with inline label editing

features.name: Node Toolbar
features.description: NodeActionsToolbar with type selector popover, 5 color swatches, duplicate, and delete actions

features.name: Edge Inspector
features.description: Bottom-right panel for selected edge: type (smoothstep/bezier/step/straight), animated toggle, label input

features.name: Node Palette
features.description: 220px left panel with 7 draggable node type tiles, drag-to-canvas with drop positioning

features.name: Top Toolbar
features.description: Toolbar with back link, inline title edit, save status badge, undo/redo, fit view, PNG export, minimap toggle, theme toggle

features.name: Undo/Redo
features.description: 50-deep history stack with past/future refs, push/undo/redo, triggered at semantic commit points

features.name: Keyboard Shortcuts
features.description: Delete/Backspace for selected nodes+edges, Ctrl+Z undo, Ctrl+Y/Ctrl+Shift+Z redo, Ctrl+S immediate save

features.name: Nice-to-haves
features.description: Minimap toggle, dark/light color mode with localStorage persistence, GroupNode with NodeResizer

features.name: AI Diagramming
features.description: Toolbar AI button opens modal; user types prompt, Gemini generates nodes+edges JSON via /api/diagrams/ai-generate; inserted with dagre auto-layout

features.name: Templates
features.description: Templates button opens modal with 4 pre-built templates (Flowchart, ERD, Sequence, Org Chart); click loads onto canvas

features.name: Collaboration (Supabase Realtime)
features.description: useRealtimeSync hook broadcasts node/edge changes via Supabase channel; presence tracking shows collaborator avatars in toolbar; 500ms debounce

features.name: Smart Connectors
features.description: isValidConnection prevents self-loops and duplicate edges; all new edges default to smoothstep; inline edge label popover on connect

features.name: Comments
features.description: CommentNode (yellow sticky, author/timestamp, double-click edit, no connection handles); Add Comment toolbar button; collapsible Comments panel listing all comments

features.name: Presentation Mode
features.description: Present button enters full-screen overlay; prev/next/exit controls + keyboard arrows; auto-zoom/pan to each node; slide counter; slideIndex on node data for custom order
